sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79510" key="pareuneta/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρευν-ετάω</orth>, <sense id="n79510.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sleep with</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινι</itype> dub. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Afric.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Cest.Oxy.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">412.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
